fighters.name: The Logician
fighters.description: Waits for an overreach, then cuts the legs out from under it. Every exchange is a syllogism with a hidden blade.

special.name: Socratic Cross-exam
special.description: A three-step refutation that turns the opponent's own words into damage.

fighters.name: The Demagogue
fighters.description: Loud, relentless, and impossible to ignore. The Demagogue wins by keeping the room on their side, not by being right.

special.name: Rabble Rouser
special.description: A sweeping appeal that drowns counters in noise and deals heavy stagger damage.

fighters.name: The Empiricist
fighters.description: Never lets a claim stand un-sourced. The Empiricist chips away with small, factual strikes until the case collapses.

special.name: Peer Review Barrage
special.description: A rapid-fire sequence of citations that locks the opponent in place and racks up combo hits.

fighters.name: The Trickster
fighters.description: Ducks responsibility, reframes the debate, and strikes from angles that were not on the map.

special.name: Red Herring
special.description: A sudden change of subject that interrupts the opponent and leaves them arguing into thin air.
